structural_notes: Observed a concise reflective opening style, detailed evidence blocks, and practical closing language across the corpus.
anchor_snippets: Junior AI/software engineer specializing in Python, RAG pipelines, and LLM integration. I build practical systems, stay curious, and care about shipping useful tools with real-world impact.
Diplomas aside, I view myself as a perpetual apprentice. The velocity of AI engineering ensures that the moment you think you’ve 'arrived' as a developer, you’ve already fallen behind.
I apply this same restless curiosity to systems, code, and the human dynamics of the teams I build with.

I have experience in technical work from my role as an IT administrator at CNSS Solutions, where I handled system maintenance and provided technical support. As a forklift driver at Dagab AB, I have developed accuracy and the ability to work independently under pressure.
